missilesVsCitiesCodes.title: Missiles vs Cities Codes
missilesVsCitiesCodes.intro: Missiles vs Cities is built around upgrading your city, equipping missiles, destroying other buildings, and earning cash or rewards. Check the official Roblox game page and the veedio gaems community page for the latest Missiles vs Cities code drops and reward updates.

items.label: Active Codes
items.playerNote: Visit the Roblox game page and the veedio gaems community page for the newest Missiles vs Cities codes and rewards.

items.label: Expired Codes
items.playerNote: Older Missiles vs Cities codes are tracked here once they rotate out of the active list.

items.label: Expected Reward Types
items.playerNote: Missiles vs Cities confirms that players blow up other buildings for cash and rewards.

items.label: Where To Check New Codes
items.playerNote: Use the Roblox game page and the veedio gaems community page as the main update channels for Missiles vs Cities.

missilesVsCitiesBeginnerGuide.title: Missiles vs Cities Beginner Guide
missilesVsCitiesBeginnerGuide.intro: Missiles vs Cities is a Roblox destruction and upgrade game where your progress comes from improving your city and using missiles to attack other buildings. New players should focus on the simple cash loop first before spending heavily on upgrades.

items.title: Build Your City
items.description: Start by growing your city so you have a stronger base for progression.
items.tip: Your city is the center of the upgrade loop.

items.title: Upgrade Your City
items.description: Use early earnings to improve your city instead of spending randomly.
items.tip: City upgrades help your long-term growth.

items.title: Equip Missiles
items.description: Arm yourself with missiles before attacking other buildings.
items.tip: Better missiles should be prioritized when they improve destruction speed.

items.title: Blow Up Buildings
items.description: Attack other buildings to earn cash and rewards in Missiles vs Cities.
items.tip: Focus on targets you can destroy efficiently.

items.title: Reinvest Cash
items.description: Put your cash back into city upgrades and missile improvements.
items.tip: The fastest progress comes from repeating the upgrade and attack loop.

missilesVsCitiesMissileTiers.title: Missiles vs Cities Best Missiles Tier List
missilesVsCitiesMissileTiers.intro: Missiles are the main attack tool in Missiles vs Cities. Since the game rewards players for blowing up buildings, the best missile choices are the ones that destroy targets faster and help you earn cash more efficiently.

items.name: Highest-Damage Missiles
items.bestFor: Destroying buildings faster and farming cash more efficiently
items.upgradeAdvice: Prioritize these when a missile clearly gives stronger building damage.

items.name: Reliable Farming Missiles
items.bestFor: Repeated attacks, steady cash gain, and general building destruction
items.upgradeAdvice: Use these as your default missiles while building up your city.

items.name: Starter Missiles
items.bestFor: Learning the attack loop and earning first cash rewards
items.upgradeAdvice: Use them early, then replace them once stronger missiles become available.

items.name: Low-Impact Missiles
items.upgradeAdvice: Skip heavy spending here once stronger missile upgrades are unlocked.

missilesVsCitiesCityUpgrades.title: Missiles vs Cities City Upgrade Guide
missilesVsCitiesCityUpgrades.intro: City upgrades are a key part of Missiles vs Cities because the official gameplay loop starts with building and upgrading your city. A strong early plan is to improve the parts of your progression that help you earn cash faster and support better missile use.

items.purpose: Build up your city as the base of your progression.
items.playerTip: Start here before chasing expensive missile upgrades.

items.purpose: Support faster earnings from destroying buildings.
items.playerTip: Upgrade anything that helps you turn attacks into more cash.

items.purpose: Pair your city progress with stronger missile attacks.
items.playerTip: Missile power matters most when it helps you destroy buildings faster.

items.purpose: Split cash between city upgrades and missile improvements.
items.bestTimeToUpgrade: After your first stable cash loop
items.playerTip: Do not spend everything on one side if your attacks or city growth slow down.

items.purpose: Keep upgrading after the basic loop becomes easy.
items.playerTip: Use stronger cash income to push bigger city upgrades and better missiles.

missilesVsCitiesCashFarming.title: How to Farm Cash Faster in Missiles vs Cities
missilesVsCitiesCashFarming.intro: Missiles vs Cities is built around a simple loop: build and upgrade your city, equip better missiles, then destroy other buildings for cash and rewards. The fastest farming path is to keep improving your city while using missiles on targets that give reliable returns.

items.title: Upgrade your city first
items.description: Start by building up your city because city growth is the base of your progression in Missiles vs Cities. A stronger city gives you better long-term value before you spend heavily on attacks.

items.title: Equip your best available missiles
items.description: Use the strongest missiles you currently have before attacking. Better missiles help you destroy buildings more consistently in Missiles vs Cities, which directly supports cash and reward farming.

items.title: Attack buildings for cash and rewards
items.description: The official Missiles vs Cities game loop says players blow up other buildings for cash and rewards, so attacks should focus on buildings instead of random shots.

items.title: Reinvest cash into upgrades
items.description: Spend earned cash on city and missile upgrades instead of holding it too long. Each upgrade helps make the next Missiles vs Cities farming cycle faster.

items.title: Repeat the city-to-missile loop
items.description: The cleanest Missiles vs Cities farming rhythm is: upgrade city, arm better missiles, destroy buildings, collect cash, then upgrade again.

missilesVsCitiesBuildings.title: Missiles vs Cities Buildings Guide
missilesVsCitiesBuildings.intro: Buildings matter on both sides of the game: your own city needs upgrades, while enemy buildings are the main things you destroy for cash and rewards in Missiles vs Cities. This guide explains the building roles players should understand before farming or attacking.

items.title: City Buildings
items.description: Your city is the core progression system in Missiles vs Cities, and building and upgrading it is one of the main actions in the official game description.

items.title: Enemy Buildings
items.description: Enemy buildings are the main attack targets, and the game description directly says players blow up others' buildings for cash and rewards.

items.title: Upgraded Buildings
items.description: Upgraded city structures represent stronger progression in Missiles vs Cities. Players should prioritize upgrades because city growth and missile power work together.

items.title: Reward Targets
items.description: Buildings should be treated as cash targets during attacks, since wasting missiles away from buildings slows down farming progress.

items.title: Base Growth
items.description: City growth gives players a clearer reason to keep farming in Missiles vs Cities, with the main loop tying upgrades, missiles, and attacks together.

items.title: Attack Pressure
items.description: Because other players can target buildings, stronger city progress also creates more competitive pressure during public servers.

missilesVsCitiesAttackStrategy.title: Best Attack Strategy for Missiles vs Cities
missilesVsCitiesAttackStrategy.intro: Missiles vs Cities rewards players for using missiles against other buildings. A good attack strategy is not about firing randomly; it is about choosing building targets, using your best missiles, and turning every reward back into upgrades.

items.question: What should I attack first in Missiles vs Cities?
items.answer: Focus on buildings because the official Missiles vs Cities game loop is built around blowing up others' buildings for cash and rewards.

items.question: When should I upgrade missiles in Missiles vs Cities?
items.answer: Upgrade or equip better missiles when your current missiles feel too weak to destroy buildings efficiently. Stronger missiles make each attack cycle more valuable.

items.question: How do I avoid wasting attacks in Missiles vs Cities?
items.answer: Do not fire without a clear building target. In Missiles vs Cities, missiles should be used when they can help destroy structures and return cash or rewards.

items.question: Should I farm or attack more in Missiles vs Cities?
items.answer: Use both together. Upgrade your city for growth, then attack buildings for cash, then reinvest those rewards into more city and missile upgrades in Missiles vs Cities.

items.question: What is the best attack loop in Missiles vs Cities?
items.answer: Build up your city, arm your best missiles, attack enemy buildings, collect rewards, then spend the rewards on more upgrades to repeat the Missiles vs Cities loop.

items.question: Why do buildings matter in Missiles vs Cities attacks?
items.answer: Buildings are the target type directly connected to the game's reward loop. Attacking buildings is the clearest way to turn missile use into progression in Missiles vs Cities.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Missiles vs Cities

questions.question: Is Missiles vs Cities a multiplayer game?
questions.answer: Yes. Missiles vs Cities is a Roblox missile tycoon PvP game where players build cities, launch missiles, and destroy rival buildings for cash and rewards.

questions.question: How do I earn cash fast in Missiles vs Cities?
questions.answer: In Missiles vs Cities, the fastest cash comes from upgrading your city, equipping stronger missiles, and focusing attacks on enemy buildings that give reliable reward returns.

questions.question: What are the best missiles to use in Missiles vs Cities?
questions.answer: The best missiles in Missiles vs Cities are the ones that destroy buildings faster and improve your cash farming efficiency. Prioritize high-damage missiles as soon as they unlock.

questions.question: Where can I play Missiles vs Cities?
questions.answer: Missiles vs Cities is available on Roblox. You can launch it directly from the official Roblox game page on any supported device.

questions.question: Who made Missiles vs Cities?
questions.answer: Missiles vs Cities is developed by veedio gaems. The official Roblox creator group and game page are the main update channels for new content and codes.

questions.question: Are there codes in Missiles vs Cities?
questions.answer: Yes. New Missiles vs Cities codes and reward drops appear on the official Roblox game page and the veedio gaems community page, so check both for the latest updates.
